context: This one's got to be a winner. I love anything with sprinkles like birthday cake flavor so I think I'm going to love it. This one takes the cake. This is it. My favorite hands down. Easy. I love this cookie. The flavor is amazing and the texture is spot on. I only took one bite of each cookie because they are extremely high in calories. We were looking at the sign and it said that even just one cookie is about 800 or 900 calories. Is this worth the hype? Absolutely worth the hype. 100% get crumble cookies if you ever visit the US.

context: Very rich, delicious. Let's try the marshmallow. Kind of awkward to eat though. I like the smokiness of the toasted marshmallow. Salted caramel tastes the same. The only difference is the caramel syrup on top and it was an extra dollar in 50 cents so I don't think this is worth it but I like the classic. I think it's worth the hype. I enjoy it. This is longer than the hot chocolate.

context: You can see there are so many seeds on here. It is packed with seeds. I'm going to follow their instructions in the store. It said grip rip in dip. I am dipping it. I really like the flavor of the cream cheese. My only regret is that we didn't try it right away. It's still delicious but definitely if you get this I think it needs to be eaten as soon as possible. Is it worth the hype? In my opinion yes. Next up is crumble cookie. I am probably most excited to review this one because I think my algorithm knows that I'm a cookie monster. Now it's finally my turn. We got the four pack and it ended up being about 20 dollars. I chose the hot chocolate cookie. I had to get a classic chocolate chip cookie. A snicker-doodle cupcake cookie and finally a holiday confetti cookie.

It's fresh. One good thing about New York, there's always seats. We went to a lot of takeout places or carry out places today but there's a lot of public places where you can just sit and eat. Is this worth the hype? That's an easy yes. I want to rank what was my favorite viral food to my least favorite viral food. Number one, crumble cookie. I can definitely see why it gets so much hype delicious. Must go to crumble cookie. The good thing about crumble is that it's a franchise so if you visit California or Vegas you can also get crumble cookies. Those are a must. Trust me.

context: Breakfast in bed. I'm going to start with the pop up bagels because I like to eat savory food first. Today they had peppermint chocolates and rosemary butter. I went for the rosemary butter.
